title: Wire format, conversion, validation, and CLI surface
description:
Implement wire format, conversion functions, and CLI for repeating triggers from docs/plan-repeating-triggers.md.

Sections: Wire Format Changes, Conversion Functions and Call Site, Relative ExpiresAt Resolution, CLI Changes, Expects-Response Compatibility

Key deliverables:
- Add MaxFirings, ExpiresAt, Cooldown, FireCount, LastFiredAt to TriggerSpec (message/protocol.go)
- Add max_firings, expires_at, cooldown to TriggerYAMLSpec (config/role.go)
- Update triggerFromSpec to return (*automation.Trigger, error) with validation (listener.go)
- Update specFromTrigger to include runtime fields (listener.go)
- Update handleTriggerAdd to handle triggerFromSpec error return (listener.go)
- Update loadRoleAutomations to map new fields + call resolveExpiresAt (daemon.go)
- Add --max-firings, --expires-at, --cooldown flags to trigger add CLI (cmd/trigger.go)
- Update trigger list output with MAX_FIRINGS, FIRE_COUNT, COOLDOWN columns (cmd/trigger.go)
- Integration tests: TriggerSpec_NewFields, TriggerFromSpec_ParsesNewFields, SpecFromTrigger_IncludesRuntime, LoadRoleAutomations_RepeatingTrigger, LoadRoleAutomations_RelativeExpiresAt
- CLI tests: TriggerAdd_MaxFiringsFlag, TriggerAdd_CooldownFlag, TriggerAdd_ExpiresAtFlag, TriggerList_ShowsNewColumns
- Verify expects-response unchanged (no MaxFirings set = one-shot default)

References:
- Plan: docs/plan-repeating-triggers.md §Wire Format Changes, §Conversion Functions, §CLI Changes
- Depends on: h2-1kp.1 (Trigger struct fields and engine must exist first)
